violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. -Sneeze guards at buffet lines were flipped up, not adequate sneeze protection. Toppings containers at ice cream station not provided with lids.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Pooling water on floor in dish washing area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Temporary cloth matting placed on floors.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Temp cooler/freezer trailer has temporary drop lights with glass light bulbs. Not properly shielded.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop stored in mop bucket. Not allowed to air dry properly.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
